headline: Amazon Q1 Revenues Soar Y/Y, AWS Growth Hits 15-Quarter High
summary: AMZN's Q1 sales jump 17% to $181.5B as AWS posts fastest growth in 15 quarters, powering record margins and strong profit surge.

raw.headline: Amazon Q1 Revenues Soar Y/Y, AWS Growth Hits 15-Quarter High
raw.summary: AMZN's Q1 sales jump 17% to $181.5B as AWS posts fastest growth in 15 quarters, powering record margins and strong profit surge.

headline: What Apple's new CEO announcement signals ahead of earnings?
summary: Wall Street investors have been abuzz around Apple (AAPL) this past week after CEO Tim Cook announced his plans to depart from the chief executive role this September, handing the reins off to John Ternus. Apple is also expected to report its latest earnings results this Thursday, April 30. Baird senior research analyst of cloud software William Power comes on Market Domination to discuss these headlines making waves ahead of Apple's earnings release.

headline: AT&T Expands Into Cybersecurity And Public Safety As Shares Lag Targets
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has introduced Dynamic Defense cybersecurity protection for small and medium sized businesses using AT&T Business Fiber. RapidSOS HARMONY AI is now available on AT&T ESInet, aimed at upgrading how emergency communication centers manage calls and data. These launches expand AT&T’s offerings in network based security and public safety services beyond its core wireless and fiber connectivity. AT&T, trading at around $25.75, is using these new services to widen its role in digital...
